snippet.title: Watch NASA‚Äôs Perseverance Rover Land on Mars!
snippet.description:
Watch an epic journey unfold on Thursday, Feb. 18 as our Perseverance rover lands on Mars. To reach the surface of the Red Planet, the rover has to survive the harrowing final phase known as Entry, Descent, and Landing.
 
Only then can the rover ‚Äď the biggest, heaviest, cleanest, and most sophisticated six-wheeled robot ever launched into space ‚Äď search Jezero Crater for signs of ancient life and collect samples that will eventually be returned to Earth.
 
Tune in to a live video feed of key landing activities and commentary from Mission Control at NASA‚Äôs Jet Propulsion Laboratory.

snippet.description:
46.B√∂l√ľm:
TARGUN KA√áMAYI BAŇěARIYOR

PeŇüinde olduńüu emanetleri eline ge√ßiren ve Bala, Hazal, Lena hatunlarla birlikte D√ľndar Bey‚Äôi esir alan Targun; KayńĪ ObasńĪ‚Äôndan ka√ßmayńĪ baŇüarńĪr. Flatyos ve askerlerinin tuzańüńĪna d√ľŇüen SavcńĪ Bey ve ońülu Bayhoca ise son g√ľc√ľyle direnmektedir.

T√ľrk kańüanlarńĪndan gelen emanetlerin Targun‚Äôun eline ge√ßmesi b√ľy√ľk Ňüok yaratńĪrken; Osman Bey emanetleri geri almak ve Bala Hatun baŇüta olmak √ľzere t√ľm esirleri kurtarmak i√ßin zekice bir plan kurar. NńįKOLA‚ÄôNIN YENńį PLANI NE OLACAK?
Malhun Hatun‚Äôun geliŇüi ve Osman Bey‚Äôe desteńüi dengeleri nasńĪl deńüiŇütirecek? Osman Bey, Bala Hatun‚Äôu ve esirleri kurtarmak i√ßin ne yapacak? T√ľrk kańüanlarńĪnńĪn emanetlerini ele ge√ßiren Targun, elindeki kozu nasńĪl kullanacak? PlanlarńĪ sekteye uńürayan Nikola nasńĪl pozisyon alacak? SavcńĪ Bey ve Bayhoca‚ÄônńĪn akńĪbeti ne olacak? D√ľndar Bey‚Äôin planńĪ baŇüarńĪya ulaŇüacak mńĪ? G√∂ktuńü, Targun‚Äôa engel olabilecek mi?

O, k√∂m√ľr karasńĪ g√∂zleriyle, gaza ve h√ľrriyet ateŇüini tutuŇüturacaktńĪ. 

AdńĪ, Ertuńürul Gazi ońülu Osman‚ÄôdńĪ‚Ä¶ 

KaranlńĪńüńĪn i√ßinde ona yol g√∂steren ‚ÄúaŇük‚ÄĚ oldu‚Ä¶

Kan ve g√∂zyaŇüńĪyla sulanan topraklarda, g√∂k ekini gibi bi√ßilen; yedi g√∂ńü√ľ, yedi yeri, dańülarńĪ, denizleri aŇüacak bir milletin r√ľyasńĪnńĪ ‚ÄúaŇükla‚ÄĚ g√∂rd√ľ.

G√ľc√ľn√ľ kńĪlńĪcńĪndan deńüil, ‚ÄúaŇüktan‚ÄĚ aldńĪ‚Ä¶ ZorbalńĪńüa adaletle; k√∂lelińüe h√ľrriyetle direnen, tarihin g√∂rd√ľńü√ľ en b√ľy√ľk imparatorluńüa adńĪnńĪ ‚ÄúaŇükla‚ÄĚ verdi.

72 milleti kńĪran bozuk d√ľzene karŇüńĪ baŇükaldńĪrńĪ, mazlumlarńĪn sessiz √ßńĪńülńĪńüńĪna umut, KuruluŇü‚Äôun adńĪ oldu‚Ä¶

KuruluŇü Osman‚Ä¶ 400 √ßadńĪrlńĪk bir obadan, ‚Äúilahi aŇükla‚ÄĚ kurulan bir cihan imparatorluńüuna y√ľr√ľy√ľŇü√ľn hikayesi.

snippet.title: Barcelona vs. Paris Saint-Germain: Extended Highlights | UCL on CBS Sports
snippet.description:
Extended Highlights presented by Heineken 

Mbappe and PSG power past Messi and Barcelona 4-1 in the first leg of the UEFA Champions League Round of 16. Mbappe had one of his best performances of his career notching a hat trick. He opened his day with a goal in the 32‚Äô to tie at one and added two more in the 65‚Äô and 85‚Äô. Moise Kean found the back of the net in the 70‚Äô to help solidify the win.  Messi opened the scoring in the 27‚Äô by way of the penalty spot but that would be all the Spanish side could muster. 

Next up will be the second leg back in Paris, France and Barcelona has an uphill battle in front of them. 

Stream every UEFA Champions League match live on CBS All Access:
http://bit.ly/ucloncbssports

snippet.title: Life found beneath Antarctic ice sheet 'shouldn't be there'
snippet.description:
Biologists say the inadvertent discovery of sea life on a boulder underneath an Antarctic ice shelf and hundreds of kilometres challenges our understanding of how far organisms can live from sunlight.

A British Antarctic Survey team drilled through the 900-metre-thick Filchner-Ronne Ice Shelf and dropped a camera down the hole in search of mud on the seabed. To their surprise, the camera revealed a boulder ringed by animals. Video footage appear to show 16 sponges, accompanied by 22 unidentified animals which could include barnacles. It is the first time such immobile life has been found beneath an Antarctic ice sheet.  ‚ÄúThere‚Äôs all sorts of reasons they shouldn‚Äôt be there,‚ÄĚ says Huw Griffiths at the British Antarctic Survey, who analysed the footage.

Read more: https://www.newscientist.com/article/2267737-life-found-beneath-antarctic-ice-sheet-shouldnt-be-there/

snippet.title: Mars Rover Landing Overview- NOW SAFE ON MARS!!!
snippet.description:
This will be cooler than the Super Bowl. Thanks to Bill and Melinda Gates for partnering with me on this video. Read the 2021 Annual Letter, here: http://gatesnot.es/3cfnMF6

Watch the live stream- https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=gm0b_ijaYMQ&ab_channel=NASA
Main rover landing page- https://mars.nasa.gov/mars2020/
Cool rover interactive animation of the 7 mins of terror- https://eyes.nasa.gov/apps/mars2020/#/home?id=surface_operations&time=2021-02-18T12:44:05.006-08:00&rate=0
Spin the rover around in 3D- https://mars.nasa.gov/mars2020/spacecraft/rover/

Here is the video about why we should explore space even with problems here on Earth- https://youtu.be/lARpY0nIQx0

Music for the montage-

Explosions in the Sky
(Post-rock, four-member band from Texas.)

First Breath After Coma
https://youtu.be/w0o8JCxjjpM

Your Hand In Mine
https://youtu.be/cdiY6kijYHE

Song at 11:21- Bottles by A Shell in the Pit- https://open.spotify.com/track/0m6GMysIDx3gcQc6TF6HEX?si=FhjTlbBbQKayFrYtrw0dlg

snippet.title: Tozkoparan ńįskender 11. B√∂l√ľm
snippet.description:
Tozkoparan ńįskender 11. B√∂l√ľm √Ėzet:

ńįskender, resmi olarak evlat edinilmedińüinin ortaya √ßńĪkmasńĪ sonrasńĪnda Salih‚Äôin yanńĪndan ayrńĪlma tehlikesi ile karŇüńĪ karŇüńĪyadńĪr. R√ľya, ńįskender‚Äôi evlat edinmek istedińüini Salih‚Äôe s√∂yler. Salih‚Äôin ise ńįskender‚Äôi bńĪrakmaya hi√ß niyeti yoktur. ńįskender t√ľm bu olan bitenler karŇüńĪsńĪnda √ßok bunalńĪr. Bir yandan Salih‚Äôi bńĪrakmak istememekte dińüer yandan √ßok sevdińüi R√ľya √∂ńüretmenin √ľz√ľlmesine de g√∂nl√ľ razńĪ gelmemektedir. Ne yapacańüńĪnńĪ bilemeyen ńįskender Mavi Ay‚Äôdan yardńĪm ister.

 

Mavi Ay, ńįskender‚Äôin derdine √ß√∂z√ľm ararken aynńĪ zamanda KasńĪrga‚ÄônńĪn oyunlarńĪyla da baŇü etmek zorundadńĪr. Zira KasńĪrga, Mavi Ay‚ÄôńĪn √ßalńĪŇümaya fńĪrsatńĪ olamasńĪn diye ok√ßuluk m√ľsabakasńĪnńĪ √∂ne √ßekmiŇütir. Giovanni‚Äônin liderlińüinde hńĪrsla √ßalńĪŇüan KasńĪrga, bu kez sahadan galibiyet ile ayrńĪlmakta kararlńĪdńĪr.

 

ńįskender‚Äôin hem Salih‚Äôe hem R√ľya‚Äôya ihtiyacńĪ olduńüunu belirtmesi √ľzerine Mavi Ay‚ÄôńĪn aklńĪna bir √ß√∂z√ľm √∂nerisi gelir. Neden Salih ve R√ľya evlenmemektedir? B√∂ylece ńįskender kimseden vazge√ßmek zorunda kalmayacaktńĪr. Planlar yapńĪlńĪr ve hazńĪrlńĪklar baŇülar. G√∂rev Salih hocayńĪ ve R√ľya hocayńĪ evlendirmektir.

 

Mavi Ay‚ÄôńĪn ńįskender i√ßin yaptńĪńüńĪ plan iŇüe yarayacak mńĪ? KasńĪrga √∂ne √ßektikleri m√ľsabakada Mavi Ay‚Äôa karŇüńĪ galip gelebilecek mi? Mavi Ay m√ľsabakaya hazńĪrlanma fńĪrsatńĪ bulabilecek mi? Salih ve R√ľya, Mavi Ay‚ÄôńĪn planńĪna uyarak evlenmeye karar verecek mi?

snippet.description:
Need help buying your next car? Click https://www.carwow.co.uk/-help-me-carwow and my team and I will help you choose your ideal car at a fair price - from Mat Watson!

How‚Äôs this for an all-German showdown... Audi RS6 v BMW M5 Competition v Mercedes-AMG E63 S! 

All three of these contenders can produce a serious amount of power. First up we‚Äôve got Mat in his RS6, which is powered by a 4-litre twin-turbo V8 and can put down 600hp & 800Nm of torque. Alongside him we have the new BMW M5 Competition, with a 4.4-litre twin-turbo V8 delivering 625hp and 750Nm. 

And then finally we have the AMG E63 S, which is housing a 4-litre twin-turbo V8 which produces 612hp and 850Nm. 

So how do you think this will play out? The M5 puts down the most power, so will it snatch the win? Or will the Audi‚Äôs Quattro AWD prove a decisive on this wet track? There‚Äôs only one way to find out‚Ä¶ LET‚ÄôS RACE!

snippet.title: Ovaj poen Novaka ńźokovińáa treba pogledati joŇ° jednom
snippet.description:

He closed his heart to all romantic feelings a long time ago and his only weakness is his 5-year old nephew‚Ä¶ Little Yusuf is very well protected under his uncle‚Äôs arms, but he craves loves and sympathy. Seher is a beautiful and humble girl living with her grandfather. Her life is shaken by the death of her sister who was the bride of the KńĪrńĪmlńĪ family. From now on, she has a legacy she has to take care at all costs: Her little nephew Yusuf. This adventure will arise the long hidden secrets of the KńĪrńĪmlńĪ mansion; while a whole another legacy will start to grow in Seher and Yaman's hearts.

14. B√∂l√ľm √Ėzet: 

√Ėmer, babasńĪ Kenan‚ÄôńĪn √∂l√ľm√ľyle yńĪkńĪlan R√ľya‚ÄôyńĪ ayańüa kaldńĪrmak ve hayata d√∂nd√ľrmek i√ßin, ona kendi √ßocukluńüunu ve ge√ßmiŇüini a√ßar. √Ėte yandan ńįskender ise masum olduńüunu R√ľya‚Äôya kanńĪtlamak i√ßin harekete ge√ßer. √áelebi yeniden belediye baŇükanlńĪńüńĪna adaylńĪńüńĪnńĪ koymak √ľzeredir ve bunun i√ßin Cemre‚Äôye ihtiyacńĪ olduńüunu anlar. √áelebi‚Äôden reddedilmeyecek bir teklif alan Cemre, kńĪzńĪ G√ľneŇü‚Äôi g√∂rebilmek i√ßin bu teklifi d√ľŇü√ľnmek zorundadńĪr. Cemre, √ái√ßek, R√ľya, Tomris ve HanńĪm bir araya gelerek, √áelebi ile olan m√ľcadelelerinde yńĪlmadan savaŇüacak kadńĪn g√ľc√ľn√ľ oluŇüturacaklardńĪr.

B√ľy√ľk aŇükla evlenerek d√ľŇüt√ľńü√ľ Ňüiddet dolu kabustan k√ľ√ß√ľk kńĪzńĪyla birlikte kurtulmaya √ßalńĪŇüan Cemre‚Ä¶ G√ľzel, ayrńĪcalńĪklńĪ hayatńĪnda ger√ßeńüin yakńĪcńĪ y√ľz√ľyle hi√ß karŇüńĪlaŇümamńĪŇü R√ľya‚Ä¶ Fedakar d√ľnyasńĪnda kendi i√ßin k√ľ√ß√ľk bir mutluluk sayfasńĪ a√ßmaya √ßalńĪŇüńĪrken varlńĪńüńĪyla √∂zdeŇü g√ľzellińüini, kimlińüini yitirmenin eŇüińüindeki √ái√ßek‚Ä¶ Karakterleri ve hikayeleri birbirinden √ßok farklńĪ bu √ľ√ß kadńĪnńĪn kaderleri bir sarnńĪ√ßta √ßńĪkan yangńĪnda kesiŇüir. Alevlerin ardńĪndan hi√ßbir Ňüey eskisi gibi olmayacaktńĪr. Sil baŇütan giriŇütikleri m√ľcadelede yollarńĪ ger√ßek aŇüka ve iyi k√∂t√ľ t√ľm yanlarńĪyla ger√ßek hayata d√ľŇüer. DńĪŇüarńĪdan √∂rnek adam olarak g√∂r√ľnen varlńĪklńĪ, karizmatik, imtiyazlńĪ √áelebi‚Äônin yok edici, k√∂t√ľc√ľl soluńüu hepsinin ensesindedir‚Ä¶

snippet.title: 28 PARENTING HACKS From Crafty Moms And Dads || Tips for Being Friends with Your Child
snippet.description:
Tips and tricks every parent will be thankful for. 

Being a parent isn‚Äôt an easy task, and most of the time, parents come across more problems than they can solve. Well, to help you out, I wanted to share with you some amazing hacks that will save you time and the hassle that comes with taking care of a little one. Painting is everyone‚Äôs favorite activity, but it can be very messy ‚ÄĒ and clothes get destroyed. So, to keep your little one‚Äôs outfit nice and clean, use a plastic bag as an apron for them. Toddlers tend to drop their pacifiers all the time, and once the pacifier is down, it needs to be cleaned. To prevent that from happening, tie the pacifier on a balloon. You can use a closet organizer and label it for each day of the week to make sure that picking outfits for the day won‚Äôt take hours. Watch until the end to discover all the genius parenting hacks you need to know. 

Timestamps: 

0:31 ‚ÄĒ The pacifier hack 

2:42 ‚ÄĒ A little water, pepper, and soap experiment 

5:32 ‚ÄĒ The getting along/best friends‚Äô shirt

snippet.title: Dodge Challenger Demon v Porsche 911 Turbo S - DRAG RACE
snippet.description:
Need help buying your next car? Click https://www.carwow.co.uk/-help-me-carwow and my team and I will help you choose your ideal car at a fair price - from Mat Watson!
.............................................................

It‚Äôs time for an almighty USA vs Germany drag race! 

Mat‚Äôs in the absolutely huge Dodge Challenge Demon, and he‚Äôs lining up against Yianni in the Porsche 911 Turbo S! 

When you compare them on paper, it looks like the Dodge has it in the bag. With a humungous 6.2-litre supercharged V8 under its massive bonnet, the Challenge Demon can put down 808hp and 972Nm! As a result, it seemingly dwarfs the 911 Turbo S, which has a 3.8-litre twin-turbo flat-six, which can produce 650hp & 800Nm. 

But of course, this isn‚Äôt the first time we‚Äôve driven a Porsche 911 Turbo S on this channel, and we know you‚Äôre pretty much guaranteed a 1/4 mile time of less than 10.5 seconds! 

So how do you think this will play out? Will the Dodge be able to put its power down? Or is the Porsche set to grab another victory? 

You‚Äôll have to keep watching to find out!

Thanks to CS Panda for lending us the Dodge - https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCxwBVsAoWWkQjKmSKOx5u2A

snippet.title: Emanet 121. B√∂l√ľm FragmanńĪ | Legacy Episode 121 Promo (English & Spanish subs)
snippet.description:
Abone Ol / Subscribe: https://bit.ly/2TLyNnG
Yaman KńĪrńĪmlńĪ is a successful and young businessman who had a rough childhood but never gave up, on the contrary he even became stronger with every obstacle. He started his life from the bottom and became very wealthy. All he has in his world, is a family that he has to take care of after his father‚Äôs death. He closed his heart to all romantic feelings a long time ago and his only weakness is his 5-year old nephew‚Ä¶ Little Yusuf is very well protected under his uncle‚Äôs arms, but he craves loves and sympathy. The only happy image in his mind is his aunt Seher. 
 
Seher is a beautiful and humble girl living with her grandfather. Her life is shaken by the death of her sister who was the bride of the KńĪrńĪmlńĪ family. From now on, she has a legacy she has to take care at all costs: Her little nephew Yusuf. This adventure will arise the long hidden secrets of the KńĪrńĪmlńĪ mansion; while a whole another legacy will start to grow in Seher and Yaman's hearts. 

#Legacy
#Emanet
#SehYam

snippet.title: Zack Snyder's Justice League | Official Trailer | HBO Max
snippet.description:
In Zack Snyder's Justice League, determined to ensure Superman‚Äôs (Henry Cavill) ultimate sacrifice was not in vain, Bruce Wayne (Ben Affleck) aligns forces with Diana Prince (Gal Gadot) with plans to recruit a team of metahumans to protect the world from an approaching threat of catastrophic proportions. The task proves more difficult than Bruce imagined, as each of the recruits must face the demons of their own pasts to transcend that which has held them back, allowing them to come together, finally forming an unprecedented league of heroes. Now united, Batman (Affleck), Wonder Woman (Gadot), Aquaman (Jason Momoa), Cyborg (Ray Fisher), and The Flash (Ezra Miller) may be too late to save the planet from Steppenwolf, DeSaad, and Darkseid and their dreadful intentions.

Yaman KńĪrńĪmlńĪ is a successful and young businessman who had a rough childhood but never gave up, on the contrary he even became stronger with every obstacle. He started his life from the bottom and became very wealthy. All he has in his world, is a family that he has to take care of after his father‚Äôs death. He closed his heart to all romantic feelings a long time ago and his only weakness is his 5-year old nephew‚Ä¶ Little Yusuf is very well protected under his uncle‚Äôs arms, but he craves loves and sympathy. The only happy image in his mind is his aunt Seher. 
 
Seher is a beautiful and humble girl living with her grandfather. Her life is shaken by the death of her sister who was the bride of the KńĪrńĪmlńĪ family. From now on, she has a legacy she has to take care at all costs: Her little nephew Yusuf. This adventure will arise the long hidden secrets of the KńĪrńĪmlńĪ mansion; while a whole another legacy will start to grow in Seher and Yaman's hearts.

snippet.title: 3D PEN VS GLUE GUN! 17 Cool Hacks And Crafts For You
snippet.description:
We‚Äôve tried every 3D pen and hot glue craft we could imagine, and here‚Äôs what we created. Aren‚Äôt 3D pens just amazing? You can create anything you can think of, make it colorful and give it purpose. Today, we wanted to experiment with something new, and we wanted to show you some amazing hacks you can create at home. But first, let‚Äôs try some experiments with hot glue. Why buy a bath mat when you can make a colorful one with glitter using hot glue? To make it look store-bought, use a printed pattern and some greaseproof paper on top. Sometimes charging your phone becomes a nuisance, so today, we show you how to create a stand for your phone using a 3D pen. But for those of you who want to get craftier, we show you how to make a beautiful romantic ring from scratch using a 3D pen. Watch until the end to discover some fantastic tricks and crafts you‚Äôll adore. 

Timestamps: 

1:06 ‚ÄĒ How to fix a broken wood piece 

2:25 ‚ÄĒ DIY ring 

2:48 ‚ÄĒ Beautiful, DIY jewelry holder 

4:15 ‚ÄĒ DIY hair comb 

6:53 ‚ÄĒ Cute DIY earrings 

9:03 ‚ÄĒ DIY fake nails

Any action you take upon the information on this video is strictly at your own risk, and we will not be liable for any damages or losses. But first, let‚Äôs try some experiments with hot glue. Why buy a bath mat when you can make a colorful one with glitter using hot glue? To make it look store-bought, use a printed pattern and some greaseproof paper on top. Sometimes charging your phone becomes a nuisance, so today, we show you how to create a stand for your phone using a 3D pen. But for those of you who want to get craftier, we show you how to make a beautiful romantic ring from scratch using a 3D pen. Watch until the end to discover some fantastic tricks and crafts you‚Äôll adore.

snippet.description:
Bu dizi ve √ßok daha fazlasńĪ puhutv'de ‚Üí https://puhutv.com/kuzey-yildizi-ilk-ask-detay?utm_medium=referral&utm_source=youtube&utm_campaign=kuzey_yildizi_ilk_ask&utm_content=detay

Kuzey YńĪldńĪzńĪ "ńįlk AŇük"a abone olmak i√ßin ‚Üí http://bit.ly/kzy-yldz-dd-sub

Kuzey‚Äôle YńĪldńĪz; bir k√∂pr√ľn√ľn √ľst√ľndeki iki inat√ßńĪ ke√ßi, aynńĪ denizin iki hńĪr√ßńĪn dalgasńĪdńĪr. YńĪldńĪz, Kuzey‚Äôi, kendini bildi bileli sevmektedir. Ondan baŇükasńĪnńĪ g√∂z√ľ g√∂rmemiŇütir. Aileler de birbirinin can dostu olduńüundan Kuzey‚Äôle YńĪldńĪz‚Äôa ivedilikle birer s√∂z y√ľz√ľńü√ľ takńĪlńĪr. Amma ve lakin, Kuzey, √ľniversite okumak i√ßin ńįstanbul‚Äôa gittińüinde t√ľm s√∂zlerini unutur, yeni aŇüklara yelken a√ßar.

Bu durum, ailesi ve YńĪldńĪz tarafńĪndan √∂ńürenildińüinde ise Kuzey, kendi ailesi dahil k√∂ydeki herkes tarafńĪndan aforoz edilir. ArtńĪk Kuzey‚Äôin ne bir memleketi, ne de bir ailesi vardńĪr. YńĪldńĪz, Kuzey‚Äôini, g√∂ńü√ľn√ľ ayakta tutan direńüini, bildińüi tek y√∂n√ľn√ľ kaybetmiŇü, kalbine √ßakńĪlan bir kazńĪkla √∂ylece kalakalmńĪŇü, bunun acńĪsńĪnńĪ, bir an olsun unutmamńĪŇütńĪr. 

Kuzey, aŇüńĪk olduńüu kadńĪnla evlenmiŇü, √ľ√ß √ßocuk sahibi olmuŇütur ama YńĪldńĪz‚Äôa yaŇüattńĪńüńĪnńĪ tam yirmi sene sonra yaŇüamńĪŇü, terk edilmiŇü; √ľstelik dolandńĪrńĪlńĪp sńĪfńĪr noktasńĪna gelmiŇütir. Kuzey, yńĪllar √∂nce binbir umutla geldińüi ve hayallerini, en g√ľzel g√ľnlerini yaŇüadńĪńüńĪ Ňüehri, √ľ√ß kńĪzńĪyla birlikte terk edip memleketine d√∂nmeye karar verir. 

KńĪzlarńĪyla birlikte kendisini dońüduńüu topraklara kabul ettirecek, ettiremese de gitmeyecek, orda kalacaktńĪr. Ama YńĪldńĪz, onu geldińüi yere g√∂ndermeye, onu d√∂nd√ľńü√ľne piŇüman etmeye yeminlidir. ńįŇüin i√ßine bir de biri gen√ß kadńĪnlńĪńüńĪn eŇüińüinde, biri ergenlińüin doruklarńĪnda, dińüeri de √ßocuk yaŇüta √ľ√ß tane kńĪz √ßocuńüu ve Kuzey y√ľz√ľnden birbirine d√ľŇüman olmuŇü iki aile eklenince olaylar kontrol edilemez bir hal alńĪr.

Kuzey gitmemeye, YńĪldńĪz affetmemeye, aileler de barńĪŇümamaya yeminlidir. Bu inat hikayesinden en √ßok inat eden, pes etmeyen galip √ßńĪkacaktńĪr. Ňěimdilik kimsenin pes etmeye niyeti yoktur.

snippet.title: AFRńįKA'DA SU KUYUSU A√áTIK / NńįJER
snippet.description:
Selamlar arkadaŇülar! Bu videomuzda deńüerli ńįHH ńįnsani YardńĪm VakfńĪ ile birlikte Nijer'de temiz suya uzak olan bir k√∂yde temiz su kuyusu ve derme √ßatma sńĪnńĪflarda eńüitim g√∂ren kardeŇülerimizin daha sańülńĪklńĪ koŇüullarda eńüitim g√∂rebilecekleri bir okulun a√ßńĪlńĪŇüńĪna vesile olduk. Sizlerin de desteńüi sayesinde Afrika'daki kardeŇülerimizin hayatlarńĪ boyunca unutmayacańüńĪ anńĪlar biriktirdik. Siz deńüerli takip√ßilerimize ve ńįHH ńįnsani YardńĪm VakfńĪna bize bu mutluluńüu yaŇüattńĪńüńĪnńĪz i√ßin teŇüekk√ľr ederiz. ńįyi seyirler.

ńįHH ńįnsani YardńĪm VakfńĪ'nńĪn 123 √ľlkede yaptńĪńüńĪ yardńĪm kampanyalarńĪnńĪ incelemek i√ßin internet sitesini ziyaret edebilirsiniz.
www.ihh.org.tr
www.youtube.com/c/ihhtr

Kafalar kanalńĪ √ľyeleri olarak her hafta sizlere bir birinden g√ľzel i√ßerikler √ßńĪkartmaya √ßalńĪŇüńĪyoruz. Elimizden geldińüince sizleri mutlu etmek istiyor ve daha profesyonel iŇülere hep birlikte ulaŇümak istiyoruz.  Her hafta saat 18:00'da yayńĪnlamaya √ßalńĪŇütńĪńüńĪmńĪz bu i√ßerikleri siz deńüerli takip√ßilerimizin beńüenisine sunuyoruz. Sizlere ne olursa olsun teŇüekk√ľr ederiz ve bu desteńüin y√ľk√ľml√ľl√ľńü√ľn√ľ bildińüimizi bilmenizi isteriz. HatalarńĪmńĪz i√ßin l√ľtfen bizi yorumlarda ''uygun'' bir dil ile uyarńĪnńĪz. ńįyi seyirler, like atmayńĪ ve abone olmayńĪ unutmayńĪnńĪz :)

snippet.title: MIC-MC-GOD MODE (OFFICIAL AUDIO)
snippet.description:
MIC-MC : https://www.instagram.com/micmc_93/

TEKST:

Koliko svez brate
vi morate da vezbate
jer repovati ne znate
sve znate,face su vam bez brate
sta je to u trendingu mora da me zezate
predahnem 

Ne mogu vise da gledam ova sranja,dranja,pomilovanja
imam nocne more sanjam

celija mozdana mi manja kazu mi da sam bog
bolje bi bilo bogu da se klanjas 

ne mogu stati ja dok ne dodje do klanja
jebeno lud evo mentalnog mi stanja 
eto me svud samo ganjam
vidi mi trud vidi kralja 
hejtere udarim preko glave poput thorovoga malja 

brate udarim kako valja,neko mi tamo obraz kalja 
habada babada babada babada govore glupi ljudi puni znanja
koliko repera trebam da pokidam da bi razumeli da sam budala
voli me svaki blok kraj stek voli me svaka mahala 
reperi za mene su sala meni je mikrofon taj alat
bolje mi bezi bre pedala,hteo bi feat neka hvala  
ne mogu tik tok repere,hip hop trepere para
ne mogu da mi plate pa se zapale izgore ko cigara
stivena sigala glume ala nemaju signala 
ponela ih slava dali za to deo svog anala
u Srbiji sam tata,kralj bog,eminem pa alah 
tako govore ljudi za mene pa mi previsoka skala 
ovo je odvod,prati moj hod UFO moj brod
ljudi su govna neki su manji govnima su pod rod
ja sam pro pro nisam propo moj kod 
10 dina ovde sada uso sam u GOD MOde


Malo mi treba da napadnem likove
moji mi govore ne veruj nikome 
pojedem barove snerove bitove 
ne moze niko da ponovi i to me 
zele kopirati praviti hitove
da li je moguce neko da skine me 
picke mekane face im vilene
oni bi hteli dole da vide me 

ne mogu dole da budem ja gorim 
i gorivo tera me jako da lomi
i repere volim kad leze u komi
a lirika zube im polomi boli 
ti bogovi pitaju kako postojim
i rogovi rastu mi sebe se bojim
jebe se meni da pobede brojim
propali ovi tu reperi tvoji

Za 10 godina nisam postigo ono sto ti si 

zabole me ono sto mi visi 

razlika izmedju mene i tebe 
kad ja repovo sam ti si tati u testisu bio samo orhitis-guglaj

U prevodu bio si bol u mudima
svako se pita na sta tacno ja aludiram 
ovo skola je za sve a oni mi uzina 
radis playback to ti je kao sebi da aplaudiras 
boii

Vidim dredove te furas glumac
nisi lil pump mozda mala pumpica za kurac
dm rejpujes mi nisam do sad video te buraz 
ni spomenuo pa ne znam zasto se tu guras

hoces clout vidim da si nula 
jebo mir hocu rat evo kozna frula
posto vidim bas si zapeo da duvas 
takve jebem vec odavno nemoj tu da mi se kurvas

snippet.title: KuruluŇü Osman 44. B√∂l√ľm
snippet.description:
44.B√∂l√ľm √Ėzeti:
SavcńĪ Bey‚Äôin s√ľrpriz hamlesi!

Osman Bey‚Äôin kararńĪ ile obadan s√ľr√ľlen G√∂ktuńü ve Targun, intikam i√ßin Bizans‚Äôla ittifak yapar ve g√ľ√ßlerini Flatyos‚Äôla birleŇütirir. D√ľndar Bey, Nikola ile g√∂r√ľŇümek √ľzere bir kez daha ńįneg√∂l Kalesi‚Äônin yolunu tutarken, √ßaresiz kalan Lena, Bayhoca‚ÄôyńĪ geri alabilmek i√ßin Flatyos‚Äôtan yardńĪm ister. snippet.description:
182. B√∂l√ľm: 
HńĪzńĪr √áakńĪrbeyli, annesinin acńĪsńĪnńĪ yaŇüamaya fńĪrsat bulamadan eŇüi Ceylan √áakńĪrbeyli ve Bahar SincanlńĪ‚ÄônńĪn ka√ßńĪrńĪlmasńĪyla bir Ňüok daha yaŇüar. EŇüini kurtarmak i√ßin hemen her yola baŇüvuran HńĪzńĪr √áakńĪrbeyli, d√ľŇümanńĪ Yaman Korkmaz‚ÄôńĪnda yardńĪmńĪyla Fuat‚ÄôńĪn peŇüine d√ľŇüer. Yaman Korkmaz, HńĪzńĪr √áakńĪrbeyli‚Äôye yardńĪm elini uzatńĪrken bir taraftan da kendi planlarńĪnńĪ uygulamaya baŇülar. Ceylan √áakńĪrbeyli i√ßin g√∂z√ľn√ľ karartan HńĪzńĪr √áakńĪrbeyli, bu uńüurda Fuat‚ÄôńĪ da √∂ld√ľr. 
 
ńįdris Reis ońülu Kaya‚ÄônńĪn intikamńĪ i√ßin akrabalarńĪyla birlikte plan yapar. Fa√ßalńĪ ailesinin evine baskńĪn yapmaya hazńĪrlanan ńįdris Reis‚Äôin kardeŇüi Demir, beraber iŇü tuttuńüu Yaman Kormaz‚ÄôńĪn kurduńüu oyunda piyon olmaya hazńĪrdńĪr. Abisinin emri ile masa liderlińüine gelen ńįlyas √áakńĪrbeyli ise yaŇüanan kaos ortamńĪndan uzaklaŇümak ister. ńįlyas √áakńĪrbeyli eŇüi √Ėm√ľr‚Äôle birlikte yurt dńĪŇüńĪna √ßńĪkma planlarńĪ yapar.  
 
Ebru‚Äônun hain √ßńĪkmasńĪnńĪn ardńĪndan adeta diken √ľst√ľnde duran HńĪzńĪr √áakńĪrbeyli, kendisine savaŇü a√ßan Ňüebekenin baŇüńĪndaki Fethi‚Äôye ulaŇümak i√ßin plan yapmaya baŇülar. Fuat‚ÄôńĪn √∂lmesiyle yeni bir oyun kuran Fethi ise HńĪzńĪr √áakńĪrbeyli‚Äôye kendi kalesinde ders vermek ister. Fethi, HńĪzńĪr √áakńĪrbeyli‚Äônin otelinde canńĪndan √ßok sevdińüi yeńüenini vurur.
